allow: PowerShell(cd e:\\crm\\server; Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/health" -ErrorAction Stop; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@crm.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $drivers = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/drivers" -Headers $headers; "Drivers: " + $drivers.Count; $stats = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/stats/dashboard" -Headers $headers; "Active: " + $stats.totals.active + " | Total: " + $stats.totals.total)

PowerShell(Get-Process node | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd e:\\crm\\server; $proc = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; echo "Server PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@crm.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $stats = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/stats/dashboard" -Headers $headers; "Total: $\($stats.totals.total\) | Active: $\($stats.totals.active\) | Interviews: $\($stats.totals.interviews\)"; "Starting soon: $\($stats.startingSoon.Count\) | Monthly data points: $\($stats.monthlyData.Count\)")

PowerShell(cd e:\\crm\\server; $srv = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $login = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"sarah@crm.com","password":"pass123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; "Sarah login: " + $login.user.name + " \(" + $login.user.role + "\)"; $token = $login.token; $h = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $myDrivers = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/drivers" -Headers $h; "Sarah's drivers: " + $myDrivers.Count; $myDrivers | ForEach-Object { $_.name + " - " + $_.status }; Stop-Process $srv -Force)

PowerShell(cd e:\\crm\\server; $srv = Start-Process node -ArgumentList "index.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $login = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@crm.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; "Login: " + $login.user.name; $h = @{Authorization="Bearer $\($login.token\)"}; $drivers = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/drivers" -Headers $h; "Drivers:"; $drivers | Select-Object name, status, city | Format-Table; Stop-Process $srv -Force)

PowerShell($env:PATH = $env:PATH + ";C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin;C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd"; Set-Location e:\\crm; git add -A; git commit -m "Email Center: conversation-style UI, per-recruiter From address")
PowerShell($git = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($git\) { Write-Host "Found: $\($git.FullName\)" } else { Write-Host "Not found" })
